svg.style: background: #FFFFFF; background-color: light-dark(#FFFFFF, #000000); color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram name="Architecture" id="8nEqw-t2oI3Woc6deDw9"> <mxGraphModel dx="587" dy="751" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="827" pageHeight="1169" background="light-dark(#FFFFFF,#000000)" math="0" shadow="1"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="RMQ9aZpRHts_rYk6yI1K-32" parent="1" style="rounded=1;arcSize=20;fillColor=#FAECE7;strokeColor=#993C1D;strokeWidth=1.5;fontFamily=sans-serif;fontSize=14;fontColor=#4A1B0C;whiteSpace=wrap;spacingTop=4;spacingBottom=4;fontStyle=1;" value="WebAPI
Controllers, SignalR hub, DI root" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="300" x="1090" y="800" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="RMQ9aZpRHts_rYk6yI1K-33" parent="1" style="rounded=1;arcSize=20;fillColor=#E6F1FB;strokeColor=#185FA5;strokeWidth=1.5;fontFamily=sans-serif;fontSize=14;fontColor=#042C53;whiteSpace=wrap;spacingTop=4;spacingBottom=4;fontStyle=1;" value="Infrastructure
EF Core, Repositories, Interceptors" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="300" x="1090" y="900" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="RMQ9aZpRHts_rYk6yI1K-34" parent="1" style="rounded=1;arcSize=20;fillColor=#E1F5EE;strokeColor=#0F6E56;strokeWidth=1.5;fontFamily=sans-serif;fontSize=14;fontColor=#04342C;whiteSpace=wrap;spacingTop=4;spacingBottom=4;fontStyle=1;" value="Application
Pipelines, Services, DTOs, Validation" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="300" x="1090" y="1000" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="RMQ9aZpRHts_rYk6yI1K-35" parent="1" style="rounded=1;arcSize=20;fillColor=#EEEDFE;strokeColor=#534AB7;strokeWidth=1.5;fontFamily=sans-serif;fontSize=14;fontColor=#26215C;whiteSpace=wrap;spacingTop=4;spacingBottom=4;fontStyle=1;" value="Domain
Entities, Aggregate roots, State machine" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="300" x="1090" y="1100" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="RMQ9aZpRHts_rYk6yI1K-36" parent="1" style="rounded=1;arcSize=20;fillColor=#FAEEDA;strokeColor=#854F0B;strokeWidth=1.5;fontFamily=sans-serif;fontSize=14;fontColor=#412402;whiteSpace=wrap;spacingTop=4;spacingBottom=4;fontStyle=1;" value="UI
Angular 17, PrimeNG, SignalR 
" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="241" x="1119.5" y="680" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="RMQ9aZpRHts_rYk6yI1K-37" edge="1" parent="1" source="RMQ9aZpRHts_rYk6yI1K-32" style="endArrow=open;endSize=8;strokeColor=#888888;strokeWidth=2;" target="RMQ9aZpRHts_rYk6yI1K-33"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="RMQ9aZpRHts_rYk6yI1K-38" edge="1" parent="1" source="RMQ9aZpRHts_rYk6yI1K-33" style="endArrow=open;endSize=8;strokeColor=#888888;strokeWidth=2;" target="RMQ9aZpRHts_rYk6yI1K-34"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="RMQ9aZpRHts_rYk6yI1K-39" edge="1" parent="1" source="RMQ9aZpRHts_rYk6yI1K-34" style="endArrow=open;endSize=8;strokeColor=#888888;strokeWidth=2;" target="RMQ9aZpRHts_rYk6yI1K-35"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="RMQ9aZpRHts_rYk6yI1K-40" edge="1" parent="1" source="RMQ9aZpRHts_rYk6yI1K-33" style="endArrow=open;endSize=8;strokeColor=#888888;strokeWidth=2;exitX=0;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="RMQ9aZpRHts_rYk6yI1K-35"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="1050" y="930" /> <mxPoint x="1050" y="1130" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="RMQ9aZpRHts_rYk6yI1K-41" edge="1" parent="1" source="RMQ9aZpRHts_rYk6yI1K-36" style="endArrow=open;endSize=8;strokeColor=#888888;strokeWidth=2;dashed=1;dashPattern=6 3;fontSize=11;fontColor=#888888;" target="RMQ9aZpRHts_rYk6yI1K-32" value="HTTP / SignalR"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(250, 236, 231), rgb(41, 29, 25)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(153, 60, 29), rgb(236, 156, 130));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 298px; height: 1px; padding-top: 150px; margin-left: 51px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #4A1B0C;
display: inline-block; font-size: 14px; font-family: sans-serif; color: light-dark(#4A1B0C, #efc7ba); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
